tool_args.label: East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: Contract CS179 is a systems installation and integration contract for the East Side Access project

payload.description: Systems installation and integration contract including fire suppression system. Modification to replace fire standpipe valves in the tunnels and retest the fire suppression system.

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access
tool_args.raw_text: Penn Station Access will provide Metro-North Railroad New Haven Line customers with service into and out of Penn Station via Amtrak's Hell Gate Line.

payload.description: Penn Station Access will provide Metro-North Railroad New Haven Line customers with service into and out of Penn Station via Amtrak's Hell Gate Line. Includes four new ADA-accessible stations in the East Bronx, 19 miles of new and rehabilitated track work, bridge rehabilitations, new interlockings, signal/power/communication modernization, and expansion of New Rochelle Yard.

tool_args.label: Harold Interlocking Project
tool_args.raw_text: This project is part of the Northeast Corridor Congestion Relief Project to reconstruct Harold Interlocking

payload.description: Part of Northeast Corridor Congestion Relief Project to reconstruct Harold Interlocking to create two grade-separated conflict-free routes (Eastbound Reroute and Westbound Bypass) for Amtrak and Metro-North trains, increasing speed, capacity, and operational flexibility.

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2
tool_args.raw_text: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 (SAS2) will extend from the northern limit of SAS Phase 1 at 105 St

payload.description: Will extend from northern limit of SAS Phase 1 at 105 St, north under Second Ave, then west along 125 St. Three new stations at 106 St, 116 St, and 125 St. Connection to Lexington Avenue Line (4,5,6) and Metro-North Railroad at 125 St.
payload.status: Contract 1 awarded; remaining contracts deferred pending funding resolution

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: the Automated Camera Enforcement Program now allows for ticketing vehicles blocking bus stops or double parked in bus routes, leading to an increase in bus speed and a reduction in collisions.

payload.claim_text: The Automated Camera Enforcement Program now allows for ticketing vehicles blocking bus stops or double parked in bus routes, leading to an increase in bus speed and a reduction in collisions.
payload.subject: Automated Camera Enforcement Program

tool_args.label: MW/DBE Participation Shortfall
tool_args.raw_text: While meeting and exceeding New York State MBE goals, the MTA fell short of the New York State WBE goal and SDVOB goals by 3% and 2%, respectively.

payload.claim_text: While meeting and exceeding New York State MBE goals, the MTA fell short of the New York State WBE goal and SDVOB goals by 3% and 2%, respectively.
payload.subject: MTA Diversity and Inclusion

tool_args.label: Equity in Infrastructure Pledge
tool_args.raw_text: the MTA signed on to the Equity in Infrastructure Pledge to affirm that the MTA will award at least $1 billion of work to MWBE and/or DBE firms each year

payload.claim_text: MTA signed on to the Equity in Infrastructure Pledge to affirm that the MTA will award at least $1 billion of work to MWBE and/or DBE firms each year, increase the MTA-certified pool of MW/DBE firms, and increase discretionary contracts for design and engineering MW/DBE firms by 20% over the next five years.
payload.subject: MTA Diversity and Inclusion

tool_args.label: CBDTP Funding Impact
tool_args.raw_text: As a result of the recently-announced pause in the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP), MTA is currently unable to utilize $15 billion in proceeds from CBDTP to support the 2020-2024 Capital Plan.

payload.claim_text: As a result of the recently-announced pause in the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP), MTA is currently unable to utilize $15 billion in proceeds from CBDTP to support the 2020-2024 Capital Plan.
payload.subject: Central Business District Tolling Program

tool_args.label: Fire Standpipe Valve Replacement in East Side Access Tunnels
tool_args.raw_text: modification to replace fire standpipe valves throughout the tunnels and retest the fire suppression system

payload.description: Replace fire standpipe valves throughout the East Side Access tunnels and retest the fire suppression system. 48 valves were the wrong type due to design error and needed replacement. Limited repairs to fix leaks in existing fire standpipe valves at 63rd Street, and pressure testing the full system.
